# Dummy CRISPR Notes

CRISPR-based editing was demonstrated as a programmable tool in 2012. In this
dummy dataset, a guide RNA achieves on-target editing in about 70% of treated
cells, with an off-target rate measured at 2.5%.

A typical editing construct is roughly 4.3 kb in length and is delivered to
cultured cells for evaluation.
